steps.title: Focus on the listed years
steps.content: Only the four listed classes need to be compared: $2002$, $2004$, $2005$, and $2007$. The other years on the graph are not choices.

steps.title: Read the lowest point
steps.content:
On the line graph, the point for $2002$ is lower than the points for $2004$, $2005$, and $2007$. It represents the fewest graduates among the listed choices.
The answer is A.
